item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2019-00083 - Export Development Canada
item.description: All background information held by EDC’s Economic Political Intelligence Center (EPIC), including memos, charts, tables, final reports, presentations and Power Point slides related to EDC’s decision to lift its closed status on Saudi Arabia-related activity. | 90 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2019-00077 - Export Development Canada
item.description: EDC's current executive compensation policies including bonus incentives. | 22 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2019-00075 - Export Development Canada
item.description: Data used to measure the success of EDC's Equity Connect Strategy, including: total value of exports/purchases, signed contracts, procurement, investment in Canadian companies. | 135 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2019-00005 - Export Development Canada
item.description: "The LinkedIn profile of an EDC environmental and social advisor, indicates they led the development of EDC's human rights due diligence methodology in 2013 and its update in 2016-2017. I request any manuals, guidelines or other documents laying out that methodology and its application. Please exclude drafts of these documents; final versions will suffice." | 16 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2018-00103 - Export Development Canada
item.description: Communications from employees of EDC's Johannesburg office which contain any of the following keywords: "Gupta", "Corruption" and "State Capture". | 872 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2018-00033 - Export Development Canada
item.description: Materials referring to an April 16, 2018 report by the NGO "Above Ground". Witness testimony at the Finance Committee, and the case involving the Gupta Family. | 141 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2015-00002 - Export Development Canada
item.description: I am applying under the Access to Information Act for the following records: Please provide from January 1, 2010 to present (January 8, 2015) all records, briefing notes, meeting notes and communication (e-mail messages and other correspondence) regarding EDC's review of projects involving XXXX against the requirements of EDC's Environmental and Social Risk Management Policy. Please also provide other records already released under the Access to Information Act by EDC on this subject. | 171 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2014-00050 - Export Development Canada
item.description: Any documents prepared by EDC since March 1, 2014 pertaining to the potential impact on EDC operations of sanctions against Russia. | 1900 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2012-00019 - Export Development Canada
item.description: I would like to know if the entities referred to in the schedule have received a financial support from EDC, as well as the details of the projects for which they have received this support. I would also like to know if EDC has supported any agrofuel production projects in foreign countries. | 13 pages | Source: Export Development Canada

item.title: [38956] 2026-03 - A-2011-00086 - Export Development Canada
item.description: All information relating to Greystar Resources from Jan. 1, 1995 and present. | 249 pages | Source: Export Development Canada
